offer: For restaurant purchasing managers processing 10–20 orders/week, inefficient inventory management causes excess waste. We automate inventory tracking and order generation instead of manual inventory tracking and order generation.
problem: Inefficient inventory management leading to waste and over-ordering.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant purchasing managers

Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
